title: PLAY9 Roolo Dog Treat Dispenser Toy – Interactive Enrichment Puzzle Feeder for All Dog Sizes and Breeds – Durable Slow Feeder for Mental Stimulation & Boredom Relief
features: Interactive Design - The shape of the Roolo is based on the Reuleaux tetrahedron – a unique shape that allows for erratic and self-propelling movement. No batteries or charging required – just gravity!

Soft & Durable - Made from tough, dog safe rubber material which makes it supple and flexible, yet incredibly durable ensuring long-lasting enjoyment for your furry friend. Not to be used as a chew toy. Always supervise your pooch when playing with any toy.
Mental Stimulation - Builds confidence and keeps dogs mentally engaged, preventing issues like boredom, anxiety, excessive barking or destructive behaviour.

Easy to Use - Simply fill the toy through the centre hole with your dog's favourite kibble or treats, and let them enjoy figuring out how to get them out. The toy is easy to clean — just rinse it with warm or soapy water after playtime and leave to dry.
Mulitfunctional - Perfect for slow feeding, puppy/dog training, canine enrichment, rainy or busy days, aids digestion, manages behaviour and reward-based development.
Encourages Natural Foraging Instincts - Mimics real-world problem-solving, helping dogs engage their brains in a healthy way.
Vet & Trainer Recommended - Designed and developed by canine experts, the Roolo is a trusted choice for dog professionals and pet parents alike.
Supports Behavioural Training - Helps reinforce patience, focus, and problem-solving skills, making it a useful tool for training sessions.
Not Loud or Annoying - Unlike hard plastic toys that clatter on the floor, the Roolo’s unique material absorbs impact, making playtime enjoyable without the noise.
description: Product description Introducing the award winning Roolo Interactive Dog Toy by Play9, an ingenious treat-dispensing enrichment toy that combines mental stimulation with physical activity for your canine companion. This distinctive triangular-shaped dispenser in vibrant blue is designed to challenge and engage your dog, making treat time an exciting adventure. As your pet interacts with the Roolo, it wobbles and rolls unpredictably, gradually releasing treats through its cleverly designed opening. The sturdy construction ensures durability during play, while the unique shape creates an engaging puzzle that keeps dogs interested and active mentally and physically. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, this interactive toy helps prevent boredom, encourages problem-solving skills, and provides entertainment for dogs of all sizes and breeds. The Roolo can be filled with your dog's favourite kibble or treats, making it an excellent tool for slowing down eating habits. With just 15 minutes use means your pooch gets the same stimulation as a 1 hour walk! Its easy to clean, ensuring a safe hygienic play experience for your furry friend. Directions Step 1 - Fill up the Roolo® with you pooches favourite dry treats and place it on the floor. Step 2 - Allow them to have a sniff and investigate, making sure to give praise when they paw, nudge, or nose it. Step 3 - Slowly roll the Roolo® over so a treat falls out, allow them to get the treat, give a “YES, good boy/girl”, then repeat a few times until they understand how to get the treats!
